problem id: 4024acac
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHL(2)

examples:
  01011010 -> 00101000
  11101001 -> 10100100
  10010000 -> 01000000
  00101101 -> 10010100
  01110100 -> 00010000
  10001100 -> 00000000
  11000100 -> 00000000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00011111 -> 00001100

query: 10000100
predicted answer: 00000000
